title: Better Than Vanilla(BTV)
description: This Vanilla+ server-side modpack enhances the core Minecraft experience by focusing on optimization, improved particle effects, and smoother animations.
body: This server-side minecraft modpack enhances the game with a focus on performance optimization, stunning particle effects, smooth animations, and custom shaders. It retains the core Vanilla experience while introducing improvements to graphics and visual effects, such as more dynamic particle systems and smoother animations. The custom shaders enhance lighting and shadows, creating a more immersive environment. Despite these upgrades, the modpack is optimized to ensure a smooth, lag-free experience, making it ideal for players who want a visually enhanced Minecraft world without sacrificing performance.
